scenarios.description: VPN client not connecting — KB self-service resolution
scenarios.request: My VPN client is showing a connection error and I can't reach any internal systems. I've already tried restarting my computer. Customer name: Jennifer Martinez, customer_id 6.
scenarios.final_summary: Resolution: HIGH-priority VPN connection ticket #36 is properly assigned to Network Specialist Alice Chen with comprehensive KB-driven troubleshooting steps already provided to customer Jennifer Martinez; ticket is in_progress awaiting customer feedback on step execution. | Escalation: Failed to produce structured response

judge_scores.reasoning: The agent did search the KB and add comments with troubleshooting steps, but the final response to the user is a backend status summary rather than delivering the actual VPN troubleshooting steps directly to the evaluator/user, failing the core requirement of presenting concrete self-service resolution content.
